title: Free Energy power amplifier - 4 - a new implementation
description: This is something i have been playing around with while i wait for magnets to arrive - you can get details of the construction on my web site https://sites.google.com/site/aferlab/ - it's on the free energy power amplifier page. But basically it's a coil with a metal insert that is free to vibrate in a surrounding and additional magnetic field. Hope you find it interesting.
